zh.lifeSummary: 當Rasse de Gavre VII於1139年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維時，他的父親Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders27歲，母親Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem13歲。他於大約1161年與Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1190年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rasse de Gavre VII于1139年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維时，他的父亲Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders27岁，母亲Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem13岁。他于大约1161年与Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1190年之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gavre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German Köber (see Kober ) or Göber (see Gober ).

variants.name: Kober
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Bernhard, Angelika, Dieter, Ernst, Erwin, Gottlieb, Konrad, Manfred, Reinhold, Sepp, Wolfgang.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a shortened derivative of the personal name Jakob (see Jacob ).

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German kober, German Kober ‘basket’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a basket maker or perhaps a nickname for someone who carried a basket on his back.

nameMeanings.name: Rasse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Dirk, Joris.
German: topographic name from Middle High German rœsse ‘kiln’, in particular one used for drying hemp and flax or for burning lime.
English and Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Ross  .

variants.name: Ross
meanings: Either an adoption of the Gaelic topographic term ros ‘headland’ ( compare Glen , Kyle ) or a transferred use of the Scottish surname, which is borne by a large and ancient family whose members have played a major role in Scottish history. Although still very popular in Scotland, the name is now in widespread general use.

en.lifeSummary: When Rasse de Gavre VII was born in 1139, in Gavere, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders, was 27 and his mother, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, was 13. He married Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne about 1161. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 1190.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rasse de Gavre VII est né en 1139, à Gavere, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne environ 1161. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1190.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rasse de Gavre VII 1139 in Gavere, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders 27 und seine Mutter Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem 13. Er hat um 1161 Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1190.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rasse de Gavre VII è nato il nel 1139 nel Gavere, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne circa 1161. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1190.

ja.lifeSummary: Rasse de Gavre VIIが1139年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンガバーで生まれた時，父Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flandersは27歳，母Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghemは13歳であった。約1161年にMathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1190年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rasse de Gavre VII(이)가 1139년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 게이버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem(은)는 13세였다. 그는 대략 1161년 Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rasse de Gavre VII nasceu em 1139, em Gavere, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne aproximadamente 1161. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 1190.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rasse de Gavre VII родился в 1139 г. в местности гавир, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne около 1161 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1190 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rasse de Gavre VII nació en 1139, en Gavere, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne aproximadamente 1161. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 1190.
